FX.title: USD/JPY Breakout to 156.50 Imminent as Fed-BoJ Divergence Widens
tldr_points: Fed-BoJ policy divergence supports USD strength
Geopolitical tensions elevate USD safe haven appeal
Technical breakout above MA20 likely with RSI momentum
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY tactical BUY on Fed-BoJ divergence and risk-off sentiment, target 156.50 with stop below 154.50.
FX.comment: Bullish on Fed-BoJ divergence and geopolitical risk; tactical long on MA20 support.

STOCKS.excerpt: AI-driven model flags S&P 500 breakout above MA20; target 5,100 with tight risk management.
STOCKS.comment: Breakout above MA20 confirmed by AI Analytics and Synapse signals; target 5,100.

CRYPTO.title: Quantum Clouds Overhead: Institutional Adoption Balances BTC/USD at Critical Juncture
tldr_points: Institutional capital inflows (Ripple/Keyrock, KB Card) contrast with acute regulatory (KuCoin CFTC) and existential (Google quantum) risks.
Absence of current price/MA20/RSI data precludes concrete technical framing; market likely range-bound awaiting catalyst.
Tactical priority is monitoring for a decisive close beyond a defined EMA20 level with RSI confirmation; neutral until.
CRYPTO.excerpt: Quantum computing threat and institutional adoption create binary volatility risks for BTC/USD; tactical stance neutral pending technical resolution.
CRYPTO.comment: No current price/MA20/RSI data; tactical stance neutral pending resolution of institutional vs. regulatory/quantum catalysts.
